steps.title: Isolate the term with s
steps.content: Starting with $6r = 7s + t$, subtract $t$ from both sides: $$6r - t = 7s$$

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: $s = 42r - t$ — multiplies rather than divides by 7. Incorrect.
  • B: $s = 7(6r - t)$ — multiplies by 7 instead of dividing. Incorrect.
  • C: $s = \frac{6}{7}r - t$ — fails to divide $t$ by 7. Incorrect.
  • D: $s = \frac{6r - t}{7}$ — both terms divided by 7 correctly. That matches choice D — D is correct.
